relevantPriorWork: file_health.py — already iterates docs/ + parses frontmatter (REUSE as ingest base)
bcos_sync.py — upstream tip cache → diff-from-upstream layer (CONSUME)
schedule-config.json — KNOWN_AUTO_FIX_IDS for skill/agent halo references
context-audit skill — already does CLEAR compliance scoring (potential data source)

scenario.rationale: Work is entirely in .claude/scripts/bcos-dashboard/ (new modules + panels + frontend). Reads docs/ frontmatter but does NOT modify any docs.

contextGathered.architecture: Python stdlib HTTP server + vanilla JS frontend; Panel(id, kind, ttl, collector) pattern; hidden panels via /api/panel/<id>; settings sub-pages already established (/settings/runs, /files, /schedules, /technical).
contextGathered.ingestionAnchor: file_health._iter_docs() + _parse_frontmatter() — small, well-scoped, perfect to extract into a shared atlas_ingest.py that both file_health.py and the new atlas collectors consume.
contextGathered.renderingDecision: HTML+CSS treemap (no SVG generator dep), Mermaid for relationship graph (client-side render, zero new deps), CSS Grid Kanban for lifecycle. Stays in the existing 'zero-dependency Python stdlib + vanilla JS' constraint.
contextGathered.iaDecision: New top-level page /atlas (primary view, not a setting). Cockpit gets a small teaser tile linking into it. Three lenses are tabs within /atlas, not separate pages.
contextGathered.cachingDecision: TTL panel cache (300-600s) inside the existing collector framework. No separate cron job. Atlas data is computed live on first request after TTL expiry.
contextGathered.drift_overlay: Reuse bcos_sync.py's upstream-tip cache to color framework files (docs/_bcos-framework/**) by drift state — clean / locally-modified / behind-upstream.

userIntent.raw: Plan the 'Context Atlas' visualization feature for the BCOS dashboard — a new layer on the existing Python+vanilla-JS dashboard that visualizes docs/context architecture (not code). Three lenses: Ownership Map (treemap by domain), Relationship Graph (force-directed from frontmatter), Lifecycle Flow (Kanban inbox→planned→docs→archive). Innovative additions: CLEAR compliance ring, skill/agent impact halo, freshness-vs-volatility coloring, diff-from-upstream layer. Tradeoff: start static (Python-generated SVG/Mermaid) vs interactive D3/Cytoscape. Should share one frontmatter-ingestion pass with parallel sync work in .claude/scripts/bcos-dashboard/.
userIntent.objective: Add a Context Atlas view to the BCOS dashboard that surfaces semantics in YAML frontmatter (ownership, relationships, lifecycle, freshness, CLEAR compliance, upstream drift) — with one shared frontmatter ingestion pass and a static-first rendering pipeline.

steps.name: Understand Intent
steps.result: Intent parsed; AGENTING scenario likely (touches .claude/scripts/bcos-dashboard/, reads docs/ for data only). Session folder created.

steps.name: Run Discovery
steps.result: 1 agent (explore), 13 skills (no overlap), 0 lessons. Strong reuse anchors: file_health.py parser, single_repo Panel pattern, bcos_sync upstream cache.

steps.name: Detect Scenario
steps.result: AGENTING (primary) — all changes inside .claude/scripts/bcos-dashboard/; docs/ read-only.

steps.name: Gather Context
steps.result: Architecture documented in contextGathered. Static-first rendering, TTL panel cache, /atlas top-level page, drift overlay reuses existing cache.

steps.name: Load Scenario Template
steps.result: Loaded AGENTING template: discovery → design → implementation → integration audit → ecosystem state → learnings.

steps.name: Create Plan Artifacts
steps.result: Created plan-manifest.json (7 phases, 30 tasks) and implementation-plan.md.

gate.condition: Review latest dashboard edits before starting Phase 1 — parallel session made refinements during planning.
